A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After fetching all articles, the agent computed description lengths correctly but used an over-broad keyword-based sports detector (e.g., matching "race") in its execute_python step, causing a non-sports article ("2004 US Senate Outlook") to be misclassified as sports and returned, rather than the true sports article with the longest description ("The Rundown").
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
